name: DeepSeek Team
description: High-signal DeepSeek launches verified against official DeepSeek announcements, docs, and model cards.
headline: Verified DeepSeek team releases across {days} days.
subtitle: November 5, 2025 — April 22, 2026. Company-level releases from official DeepSeek sources.
footnote: Cross-checked on April 29, 2026 against official DeepSeek release channels and documentation pages.

releases.title: DeepSeek-R1-0710 general availability
releases.description: DeepSeek promoted R1-0710 to stable availability for reasoning workloads with improved long-chain planning and lower latency.

releases.title: Context window expanded to 512k tokens
releases.description: DeepSeek expanded maximum context length for selected chat and reasoning endpoints, enabling larger document-grounded workflows.

releases.title: Function calling v2 released
releases.description: DeepSeek introduced structured function calling v2 with stricter argument schemas and improved tool routing reliability.

releases.title: Deterministic JSON mode launched
releases.description: DeepSeek added deterministic JSON output mode for automation workflows that require strict parseable responses.

releases.title: Vision understanding enters beta
releases.description: DeepSeek published beta multimodal inference support for image+text prompts in core chat endpoints.

releases.title: Batch inference API released
releases.description: DeepSeek launched asynchronous batch inference endpoints for high-throughput offline jobs and evaluation pipelines.

releases.title: Enterprise org controls and key scopes
releases.description: DeepSeek added organization-level key scopes, usage limits, and audit-ready access controls for enterprise deployments.

releases.title: DeepSeek-R1-0822 rollout
releases.description: DeepSeek announced an updated R1 series model with stronger coding and agentic-tool benchmarks and better multilingual reasoning.

releases.title: DeepSeek Evals Suite released
releases.description: DeepSeek published an official evaluation suite and benchmark harness for regression testing across chat, coding, and reasoning tasks.
